`...WWwNNwWGGwGGwW...`

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me check the segmentation to find the hollow square
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
# Find nodes with gray color (likely the hollow square)
gray_nodes = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'g']
print(f"Gray nodes: {len(gray_nodes)}")
for n in gray_nodes:
    print(f"  id={n['id']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Also find G nodes (the frame)
g_nodes = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'G']
print(f"G nodes: {len(g_nodes)}")
for n in g_nodes:
    print(f"  id={n['id']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Find N nodes
n_nodes = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'N']
print(f"N nodes: {len(n_nodes)}")
for n in n_nodes:
    print(f"  id={n['id']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
